hero.tagline: The full MitID flow for a building permit in 60 seconds. Open source on bare Drupal 11. No licence fees, no per-form charges.

comparison.heading: What you get that proprietary alternatives don't offer
comparison.lead: Most workflow platforms in the Danish municipal market are closed, licence-based and vendor-hosted. Here's how we differ:

row2.title: BPMN editing
row2.us: Open it, read it, change it yourself

row3.title: Hosting
row3.us: Own server or EU VPS, ideally Denmark - you own the data and the location

row4.title: Pricing model
row4.us: Free software. You only pay for hosting and optional consulting.
row4.them: Annual licence plus a fee per submitted form or case

comparison.footnote: The proprietary alternatives solve their problem just fine. We solve it in a way you can maintain yourself, without licence costs that scale with case volume.

workflows.title: 13 BPMN case types ready
workflows.description: Building permit, parking permit, marriage booking, parental approval, formal complaint and 8 other flows shipped and ready - or write your own in the visual BPMN editor.

multiTenant.title: MitID + NemLog-in OIDC
multiTenant.description: OIDC with PKCE S256, CPR pre-fill from claims, NSIS substantial/high. NemLog-in Erhverv on the roadmap. One core, both citizen and business.

danish.title: Digital Post (SF1601)
danish.description: fake_db for local dev, WireMock for tests, Serviceplatformen for production - same code, four modes, one switch.

security.title: GDPR by design
security.description: Field-level CPR encryption, audit log on every MitID session and Digital Post send, deletion after workflow completion.

workflowDemo.title: Multi-Party Workflow Automation
workflowDemo.subtitle: See how ÅbenForms handles complex case flows with multiple parties and automatic integrations

citizen.action: Submits building permit with MitID login. System automatically retrieves CPR data and validates building address via DAWA.

caseworker.action: Receives notification via Digital Post. Reviews application, creates case in SBSYS and assigns to technical reviewer.

technical.action: Assesses building plans and compliance with building regulations. Approves or requests changes.

approval.action: Upon approval, permit is sent as PDF via Digital Post. Citizen receives real-time status updates.

eca.title: Modern ECA Workflow Engine
eca.description: ÅbenForms uses ECA (Event-Condition-Action) as a modern, actively developed replacement for the legacy Maestro system.

benefits.visual: Visual BPMN editor for easy workflow design
benefits.modern: Actively developed for Drupal 11 with modern architecture
benefits.flexible: Flexible event-driven logic without hard-coded business rules

permit.title: Building Permit (Step 1)
permit.cprHelp: Auto-filled after MitID login in production
permit.uploadHelp: Click to select files or drag and drop
permit.uploadFormats: PDF, DWG, JPG (max 10 MB per file)

security.title: Security
security.message: All personal data is automatically encrypted upon submission and handled according to GDPR

success.title: Thank you for your submission!
success.message: This is a demo - no data has been saved. In production, your application would now be sent for processing and you will receive confirmation via Digital Post.

workflow.title: Workflow Executed Successfully
workflow.nextPhaseDesc: The following steps execute automatically in production

step.approvalDesc: A dual-custody consent application requires your approval. Review the details and authenticate with MitID to confirm.
step.caseReviewDesc: Both parents have authenticated via MitID and approved. Review the application and make a decision.
step.completeDesc: The building permit application has been processed through all 4 stages - from citizen submission through dual-parent MitID authentication to caseworker approval.
step.digitalPost: Decision delivered to citizen via Digital Post
step.emailParentDesc: Secure approval link sent with 7-day deadline
step.mitidParentDesc: Parent authenticates with MitID and approves
step.caseworkerAssignedDesc: Both parents approved - case assigned to caseworker

backendDescs.Citizen identity verified via NemID/MitI: Citizen identity verified via NemID/MitID national eID
backendDescs.Personal data retrieved from the nationa: Personal data retrieved from the national CPR registry (SF1520)
backendDescs.Audit log entry created for regulatory c: Audit log entry created for regulatory compliance

kickoff.heading: Click through the full MitID flow in 60 seconds
kickoff.lead: From the citizen's MitID login through CPR-prefilled form to BPMN execution and Digital Post delivery - every step runs against real backend integrations, not setTimeout fakery.

mockBanner.title: Mock IdP - not real MitID
mockBanner.body: You're authenticating against a local Keycloak instance that mimics MitID. No real CPR number is transmitted.

auth.heading: Step 1 · Authenticate with MitID
auth.body: You'll be redirected to the mock MitID to sign in. Pick a demo user, e.g. Freja Nielsen, password test1234.

form.heading: Step 2 · Confirm building details
form.body: MitID claims have been retrieved and the form pre-filled. Add the missing details about your building project.

fields.addressPlaceholder: Street and number, postal code and city
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: E.g. 30m² extension on the north facade, level 1, materials …

form.validation: Please complete all fields before submitting

workflow.heading: Step 3 · Workflow running
workflow.body: The ECA flow is executing step-by-step on the server. These are real plugin actions - CPR lookup, audit log and Digital Post send.
workflow.noSteps: The workflow returned no steps. Check the backend log.

inbox.heading: Step 4 · Decision delivered
inbox.body: The confirmation has been written to Digital Post. In production this letter would land in the citizen's NgDP inbox. Here you can see the actual message from the log table.
inbox.empty: No letters found yet - give it a couple of seconds.

complete.heading: That's it - flow complete
complete.body: From citizen click to Digital Post receipt with no manual server steps. Want to run it again with a different test user?

contactCta.heading: Let's get your own instance running
contactCta.body: We'll spin up a POC instance for your team - your subdomain, your workflows, your branding. 1-2 weeks from first call to live demo.

commentary.title: What's happening behind the scenes
commentary.auth: The frontend redirects to /mitid/login. Drupal generates state + nonce + PKCE challenge and forwards you to Keycloak.
commentary.form: We fetch /mitid/session/{id} and pre-fill the form with id_token claims. CPR is shown masked in the UI.
commentary.workflow: POST to /api/webform/building_permit/submit runs the entire ECA flow synchronously and returns workflow.steps in the same response.
commentary.inbox: GET /api/digital-post/recent looks up aabenforms_digital_post_log by SHA-256 of your session CPR. The letter body is sanitised server-side.

capabilities.title: What's actually running
capabilities.bpmnDesc: Process flows defined in visual BPMN, executed by ECA
capabilities.mitidDesc: Authorization Code Flow with PKCE S256 and nonce validation
capabilities.digitalPostDesc: SF1601 transport - fake_db / wiremock / live test gateway
capabilities.gdprDesc: Every MitID session and Digital Post send is logged for audit

disabled.heading: The demo is not enabled here
disabled.body: Set NUXT_PUBLIC_DEMO_BYGGETILLADELSE_ENABLED=true on the next deploy to open it.

landingCta.heading: We eat MitID for breakfast
landingCta.lead: Click through the full building-permit flow - sign in with our mock MitID, watch the ECA flow run live, and find the decision in the Digital Post inbox.
landingCta.bullet1: Real OIDC handshake with PKCE and nonce
landingCta.bullet2: ECA flow runs synchronously and returns all steps
landingCta.bullet3: Letter retrieved from the Digital Post log after dispatch

kontakt.title: Contact
kontakt.heading: Get in touch
kontakt.lead: We'll get back to you as soon as possible. Note: this is a POC platform - not production-grade bandwidth.
kontakt.successMessage: We've received your enquiry and will get back to you as soon as possible.

cpr.title: CPR Number
cpr.text: Your CPR number is your Danish personal identification number in the format DDMMYY-XXXX. In production, this is automatically filled after MitID login.

cvr.title: CVR Number
cvr.text: The CVR number is the company's identification number in the format 12 34 56 78.

dawa.title: Address Search
dawa.text: Start typing your address and select from the list. The address is automatically validated via DAWA (Denmark's Address Web API).

mitid.title: MitID Login
mitid.text: MitID is Denmark's common digital identity. Log in with your MitID app or key card.

workflow.title: Workflow Status
workflow.text: Here you can track the status of your application. You will also receive updates via email and Digital Post.
